offer: For property managers processing 10-20 rent rolls/month, manual reconciliation causes cash flow gaps. We automate the reconciliation process instead of manual reconciliation using spreadsheets.
problem: Manual reconciliation of rent rolls is time-consuming and error-prone.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for property managers
Indie Hackers posts about similar workflows
DM outreach to property managers with demo video
Community forums where property managers share tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry for 1-3 rent rolls
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of manual workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing rent roll data
